command:
@"
{
  "name": "tradeboard",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta \"pnpm --filter @tradeboard/api dev\" \"pnpm --filter @tradeboard/web dev\"",
    "build": "pnpm -r build",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "lint": "eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx",
    "lint:fix": "eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx --fix",
    "format": "prettier --write \"**/*.{ts,tsx,json,css,md}\"",
    "format:check": "prettier --check \"**/*.{ts,tsx,json,css,md}\"",
    "typecheck": "pnpm -r typecheck",
    "clean": "pnpm -r clean",
    "api:nuke-cache": "rm -rf apps/api/data"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "concurrently": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint-config-prettier": "^9.1.0",
    "prettier": "^3.4.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vitest": "^2.1.0"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=22",
    "pnpm": ">=9"
  },
  "packageManager": "pnpm@9.15.0"
}
"@ | Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path "package.json"

Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path "pnpm-workspace.yaml" @"
packages:
  - 'packages/*'
  - 'apps/*'
"@

Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path "tsconfig.base.json" @"
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "lib": ["ES2022"],
    "strict": true,
    "noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "exactOptionalPropertyTypes": false,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true,
    "outDir": "dist",
    "rootDir": "src"
  },
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
}
"@

Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path ".prettierrc" @"
{
  "semi": true,
  "singleQuote": true,
  "trailingComma": "all",
  "printWidth": 100,
  "tabWidth": 2,
  "arrowParens": "always"
}
"@

Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path ".github/workflows/ci.yml" @"
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [22]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: \${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm lint
      - run: pnpm typecheck
      - run: pnpm test
"@

@'
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [22]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm lint
      - run: pnpm typecheck
      - run: pnpm test
'@ | Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path ".github/workflows/ci.yml"
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ".github/workflows"

@'
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [22]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm lint
      - run: pnpm typecheck
      - run: pnpm test
'@ | Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path ".github/workflows/ci.yml"

$dirs = @(
  "packages/core/src/schemas",
  "packages/core/src/options",
  "packages/core/src/__tests__",
  "packages/ui/src",
  "packages/ui/src/__tests__",
  "packages/data/src",
  "packages/data/src/__tests__",
  "packages/indicators/src",
  "packages/indicators/src/__tests__",
  "packages/strategies/src/builtin",
  "packages/strategies/src/__tests__",
  "packages/backtest/src",
  "packages/backtest/src/__tests__",
  "packages/sim/src/wgsl",
  "packages/sim/src/__tests__",
  "packages/paper/src",
  "packages/paper/src/__tests__",
  "apps/api/src/providers",
  "apps/api/src/cache",
  "apps/api/src/routes",
  "apps/api/src/__tests__",
  "apps/web/src/app",
  "apps/web/src/widgets",
  "apps/web/src/views",
  "apps/web/src/charts",
  "apps/web/src/workers",
  "apps/web/src/state",
  "apps/web/src/lib",
  "apps/web/src/__tests__"
)
foreach ($d in $dirs) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $d | Out-Null }
Write-Output "Directories created"

@'
{
  "name": "@tradeboard/data",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
  "exports": { ".": { "import": "./dist/index.js", "types": "./dist/index.d.ts" } },
  "scripts": { "build": "tsc", "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit", "clean": "rm -rf dist", "test": "vitest run" },
  "dependencies": { "@tradeboard/core": "workspace:*" },
  "devDependencies": { "typescript": "^5.7.0", "vitest": "^2.1.0" }
}
'@ | Set-Content -NoNewline -Encoding utf8 -Path "packages/data/package.json"

@'
